item.title: Why can't America be like other countries?
item.description: American restaurants will tell you that to pay staff appropriately, the cost of food will "drastically" go up. I'm calling BS on that. Chesapeake people appropriately and if they do a fantastic job, we will give them some additional money but don't make it mandatory on us to do your responsibility, just pay them correctly

item.title: To the dads killing it.
item.description: Having a child is like having your heart walking around exposed to the world. A dad will do what we must to keep them alive and happy, and there isn't a joy greater. Edit: sauce https://youtu.be/8PstSiTCk74

item.title: Day 267: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Jack of All Trades Ground Chuck Angus Beef Patty, Bacon, Chipotle Mayo, Avocado, Pico De Gallo, French Fries & 3 Pepper Colby Jack Cheese From Serial Grillers in Tucson, AZ Previous Day 266: https://imgur.com/gallery/2RsYjCb MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

item.title: Ukraine Update Feb 19th: False Flags, Occupation, and Militia.
item.description:
Hopefully those targeted will be able to take action. US intelligence sharing has been excellent this crisis. I can not emphases enough how extraordinary the openness of American intelligence is right now.
Russian false flag attack car bombing. Russian TV crews just happen to be around when the Ukrainians (ie Russians) blew up a rebel leaders car.
The car in question. You may be thinking that that is a very cheap looking car for the leader of a Russian backed rebel to drive.
And you would be right. This is the actual expensive UAZ Patriot he drives. They took the license plate off of the actual car and put it on a cheap old UAZ to blow up instead. Seriously.
False flag attack on occupied Donbass Vasylivka water pumping station. A Russia TV crew just happened to be at the pump when shelling started.
Russian TV crew just happens to in the area of a false flag attack. This same crew just happened to be at the location the car bombing earlier. Weird how the Ukrainians only attack areas right next to Russian TV crews.
False flag attack. Occupation authorities in parts of Donetsk region claim that they’ve killed two members of saboteur group of Ukrainian army attempting to blow up cylinders with chlorine in Horlivka. This is a lie.
Russian sources claim the video of the false flag attack came from both the dead saboteurs as well as rebel militia. Getting a story consistent is hard. Not going to bother posting the video as it is 1: Russia misinformation, and 2: It is just some dudes shooting in the woods with obvious audio overlay of prerecorded radio traffic.
Metadata shows the video of the rebel leaders speech about the false flag attacks was recorded before said attacks took place.
After being loaded on buses in Russian controlled rebel regions as part of a staged evacuation civilians are abandoned by Russia. Refugees sit on buses for several hours without food and the opportunity to go to the toilet, complain about the cold, worsening health problems and ask for help. Buses stand with the ignition off, the interior is not heated
What Russia claims is the Ukrainian plan to attack the Russian controlled Donbass region. It is a fake. The plan is written in Russian, not Ukrainian, and uses Russian place names rather then Ukrainian. An obvious fake for domestic consumption.
Anti-aircraft fire over Donetsk tonight.
In a shocking turn of events Boris Johnson has good ideas.
Ukrainian President Zelensky says that if Ukraine doesn’t receive new security guarantees from the Budapest Memorandum signatories, all articles of the 1994 agreement may be considered void. In the agreement Ukraine gave up its nuclear arsenal for security guarantees.
The 11 MHz HF Aero-OR subband in Europe. The Russian military has turned the volume on their OTH-B radar to max, that is wartime frequency and power, in an attempt to track stealth aircraft & drones.
Russian armor near the border now has tactical markings applied.
Russian artillery on the move 7km from the Ukrainian border. Source claims at least 31 guns.
Belarus becomes an occupied state. Putin has been pushing for a "union state" of Belarus and Russia for months now. Lukashenko has repeatedly prostrated to Putin, including stating his Army will follow orders from Moscow, due to his weak position and this appears to be the final act.
Kremlin propaganda mouthpiece Russia Today claims Ukraine has shelled Russia. This claim is false.
Last minute aid from the Dutch. Not much but every little bit of democratic solidarity matters.
Canadian arms land in Ukraine. Canada had previously declined to send weapons but has reversed that decision.
Estonia delivers Javelin anti-tank missiles to Ukraine.
The missiles.
Ukrainian Militia on exercise.
Many militia courses are taught by foreign volunteers, largely US, UK and Georgian vets.
Raw recruits are given wooden guns to learn firearm basics on.
The Ukrainian Army announces the first combat death of the current crisis, cause was Russian shelling.
Cat tax. Reject misinformation and stay informed. This was a long post today with little movement on the diplomatic front. Hopefully that will change. Stay safe out there. РАЗОМ ПЕРЕМОЖЕМО!
item.dc:creator: RedE100

item.title: I'm trying
item.description: Got recommended to post here for help. The pandemic has been hurting the prospects of studio work, so I need to turn to freelance commissions to survive.
